layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and alts are bleeding — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a state of fear, with most altcoins down significantly. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.5%, meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. While a few candidates show oversold readings that could trigger bounces, none have a clean enough setup with confirming signals to justify risking capital. The best approach right now is to wait for a clearer entry rather than chase into falling knives.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines with cash ready. Watch for Ethereum to pull back closer to $1,800 support — if it holds there with increasing buying volume, that could be a solid entry point. Don't rush in during fearful markets without a clear technical trigger.
expert_reasoning: Reviewing all 9 candidates, none present a high-conviction swing setup. BONK has the most oversold RSI (30.75) but chart bias is -2.0 with Three Black Crows — classic falling knife. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 58.5 and a 51.7% 5-day move means it's already extended with terrible risk/reward (0.38x). 币安人生 shows a bull flag but low liquidity and the -7% 24h drop is concerning. ETH is the best risk-adjusted option with RSI at 39 (our most reliable signal source at 80% win rate) and $41B in TVL, but price is below all major MAs and chart bias is -0.70. With BTC dominance at 56.5% crushing alts and the fear/greed at 29, the macro environment doesn't support aggressive alt entries. Better to wait for ETH to test $1,800 support and show a reversal candle.
risk_factors: Bitcoin 'volmageddon' warning could trigger a sharp BTC selloff dragging all alts lower
BTC dominance at 56.5% and rising means capital continues rotating away from altcoins
Fear & Greed at 29 is improving but hasn't reached extreme fear (below 20) where the best contrarian entries historically occur
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — does it hold or break? A bounce with volume = entry signal
Fear & Greed index trajectory — crossing above 35 would signal improving risk appetite for alts
BTC dominance — any reversal below 55% would be a strong signal to rotate into alts
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear state (29/100) with BTC dominance elevated at 56.5%, creating a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades. BTC itself is consolidating around $64,300 with modest weekly gains, but a potential 'volmageddon' scenario adds uncertainty.
context_banner: Market fear and high BTC dominance make this a patience-rewarding environment — capital preservation beats chasing setups.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 39 and BONK at 31 show oversold conditions developing, but neither has confirmed a reversal yet — RSI is our highest-confidence signal (80% win rate) so we're watching closely for sub-30 entries.
Fear & Greed at 29 ('Fear') is improving from last week's 25.9 average, but hasn't reached the extreme fear levels (sub-20) that historically produce the best contrarian entries.
Bitcoin 'volmageddon' warning article suggests a major volatility event may be brewing, counseling caution before taking new positions.
ETH derivatives reset article suggests positioning is being cleared, which often precedes a directional move — but direction is uncertain.
Strategy continues aggressive BTC accumulation (843,775 BTC) reinforcing institutional demand narrative, but Zilliqa cold wallet theft highlights ongoing security risks in the space.
